title: alchemilla grossidens f. cuneata
intro: Alchemilla grossidens f. cuneata, also known as a type of lady's mantle, is a flowering plant species belonging to the saxifrage family (Saxifragaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and astringent effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and menstrual disorders. The health benefits of Alchemilla grossidens f. cuneata include soothing and calming effects on the digestive system, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
